title: feat(audio): support custom ElevenLabs voice IDs alongside presets for eleven_v3
author: neiledwinjjmg002-boop

gist.headline: Your voice, your rules
gist.blurb: Added support for custom ElevenLabs voice IDs. Now you can bring your own cloned voices to the API, not just the presets.
gist.summary: Updated the audio API to accept custom ElevenLabs voice UUIDs alongside existing presets, enabling the use of cloned and custom voices.
gist.impact: Users can now generate speech using their own custom voice clones by passing the specific voice ID, while existing preset names continue to work unchanged.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot recording audio into a retro microphone, symbolizing the input of custom voices. A digital waveform represents the cloned output.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot holding a retro microphone, recording audio. A digital waveform floats in the air above, glowing lime green (#ecf874). A small robot with a monitor head listens intently. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'VOICE ID'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
